home.heroTitle: Modern reconciliation operations for every tenant
home.heroSubtitle: Monitor exceptions, resolve incidents, and keep payment flows trusted in real time.

scope.label: Current scope: M-Pesa / Daraja only
scope.detail: PesaGuard currently reconciles only M-Pesa / Daraja transactions; other payment rails are outside pilot scope.

onboarding.title: Customer onboarding guides
onboarding.subtitle: Review getting started steps and frequently asked questions for the pilot.

statusPage.title: Reliable, transparent operations for every pilot customer
statusPage.summary: PesaGuard is operating normally, with service monitoring, backup automation, retention enforcement, and incident response controls active across the platform. Tenant locale preferences are persisted and alert text is localized for pilot customers.

highlights.title: Operational transparency
highlights.body: A consistent status experience ensures pilot stakeholders always understand service health.

highlights.title: Governance readiness
highlights.body: Backup automation, retention enforcement, and response workflows are documented and active.

highlights.title: Customer confidence
highlights.body: The experience is designed for investor, compliance, and pilot-customer review.

postureItems: Daily backup automation enabled and verified
Restore validation is prepared for pilot environment testing
Incident response workflow remains active for critical events
Support and status communications are synchronized for customers

components.name: Webhook ingestion
components.detail: Incoming callbacks are being processed with low latency.

components.name: Reconciliation engine
components.detail: Discrepancy detection and matching remain fully active.

components.name: Alert delivery
components.detail: Notifications are routed with deduplication and severity-aware handling.

components.name: Backup and retention
components.detail: Daily backup jobs and retention enforcement are running as planned.

updates.title: Monitoring coverage
updates.message: All critical services are being observed with automated alerts and incident escalation.

updates.title: Backup automation
updates.message: The latest backup cycle completed successfully and is retained per policy.

updates.title: Support readiness
updates.message: Support channels and incident workflows are active for pilot customers.

supportPage.title: Fast, expert support for every rollout stage
supportPage.summary: Use the pilot support workspace to raise incidents, review status updates, and coordinate onboarding with the PesaGuard team. We also validate localized alerting and customer-facing messaging during pilot scope reviews.

highlights.title: Fast triage
highlights.body: Every report is routed through a defined support workflow with clear ownership.

highlights.title: Transparent escalation
highlights.body: Critical incidents receive immediate attention and customer-visible updates.

highlights.title: Operational continuity
highlights.body: The support model is aligned with incident response and reporting standards.

supportPage.reportTitle: What to include in your report
reportItems: Time of incident and affected workflow
Any screenshots, webhook samples, or export data needed for triage

channels.label: Email
channels.detail: Best for onboarding questions, policy requests, and non-urgent issues.

channels.label: Priority incident channel
channels.detail: Fastest route for live incidents and customer-impacting issues.

channels.label: Status updates
channels.detail: Review the current service posture and recent operational notices.

slaLevels.title: Critical
slaLevels.detail: Production outage, failed reconciliation, or material customer-impacting incident.

slaLevels.title: High
slaLevels.detail: Severe degradation affecting a key workflow or tenant experience.

slaLevels.title: Medium
slaLevels.detail: Non-blocking issue requiring investigation or workflow guidance.

agreementsPage.title: Clear commercial and operating terms for pilot customers
agreementsPage.summary: These materials provide a dependable foundation for customer trust, compliance review, and onboarding conversations.
agreementsPage.packSummary: These drafts reflect the current pilot scope, including localized alerting and Kenya-specific delivery requirements for customer notifications.

highlights.title: Commercial clarity
highlights.body: Pilot terms are easy to review and align with customer expectations.

highlights.title: Audit readiness
highlights.body: Documented terms strengthen compliance review and procurement discussions.

highlights.title: Operational confidence
highlights.body: The agreement pack supports trust with clear escalation and support posture.

items.title: Pilot agreement
items.summary: Defines scope, duration, support expectations, and pilot termination criteria.

items.title: Terms of service
items.summary: Outlines service boundaries, customer responsibilities, and support commitments.

items.title: Data processing agreement
items.summary: Clarifies data handling, security expectations, and deletion responsibilities.

policiesPage.title: Operational policies that reinforce trust and compliance
policiesPage.summary: These policy views make your governance posture clear to pilots, investors, and compliance reviewers.

highlights.title: Trust architecture
highlights.body: Policies are structured to support pilot onboarding and compliance conversations.

highlights.title: Data discipline
highlights.body: Retention and deletion expectations are clearly documented and operationalized.

highlights.title: Control maturity
highlights.body: Security and support practices appear consistent, explicit, and reviewable.

items.title: Privacy policy
items.summary: Explains how customer and payer data is collected, used, retained, and deleted.

items.title: Data retention
items.summary: Defines retention windows, backup handling, and offboarding disposal processes.

items.title: Security policy
items.summary: Summarizes controls for access, monitoring, logging, and response readiness.

insightsPage.title: Operational metrics and performance
insightsPage.summary: Track system health, SLA compliance, resolution efficiency, and operator performance.

toolsPage.title: Bulk operations & reporting
toolsPage.summary: CSV exports, trend analysis, auto-escalation, and reconciliation reports.
toolsPage.escalateHint: Automatically escalate unresolved critical incidents to On-Call Lead
toolsPage.exportHint: Export all incidents as CSV file
toolsPage.getStarted: Select a tool above to get started

loginPage.title: Access control
loginPage.summary: Secure demo authentication. Production auth layer can be integrated later.
loginPage.invalidCredentials: Please enter a valid email and password.

status.title: Pilot Service Status
status.summary: PesaGuard is operating normally, with service monitoring, backup automation, retention enforcement, and incident response controls active across the platform.

settings.title: Settings and configuration
settings.subtitle: Manage alert channels, incident thresholds, and operational policies for your tenant.

sections.userLocaleHint: Overrides the tenant default for your browser session. Alerts sent to you will use this language when configured.
sections.channelsHint: Configure where incident notifications are sent.
sections.warningThresholdHint: Discrepancies below this threshold trigger a warning.
sections.criticalThresholdHint: Discrepancies above this threshold trigger a critical alert.
